witnesses.description: A fixed replay of a + S(b) = S(a + b).
A fixed replay of addition commutativity.
A fixed replay of multiplication distributing over addition.

checks.claim: The listed natural values satisfy a + S(b) = S(a + b).
checks.notes: The validator checks successor_b = b + 1 and both sides equal 13 exactly.

checks.claim: The listed natural values satisfy a + b = b + a.
checks.notes: The validator recomputes both sums exactly.

checks.claim: The listed natural values satisfy a * (b + c) = a*b + a*c.
checks.notes: The validator recomputes both sides of the distributivity identity exactly.

checks.claim: There exist distinct bounded naturals x,y <= 7 with S(x) = S(y).
checks.notes: The validator enumerates all pairs in 0..7 and finds no successor-injectivity counterexample.

checks.claim: There exists a bounded natural n <= 7 with S(n) = 0.
checks.notes: The validator enumerates 0..7 and confirms no successor equals zero.

checks.claim: There exists a negative element in the bounded natural domain 0..7.

data.certificate: produce_evidence emits Evidence::UnsatArithDpll checked by Evidence::check for the bounded natural contradiction 0 <= n <= 7 and n < 0

checks.notes: The validator enumerates the fixed natural domain and confirms every element is nonnegative. The SMT-LIB artifact encodes the same obstruction as a QF_LIA contradiction, and Axeyum emits a checked arithmetic-DPLL refutation.
